dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c Prasidh Krishna b Mohammed Siraj 1 (2b 0x4 0x6 3m) SR: 50

dismissalComment.html: Placement fails Jaiswal, he launched a pull, seemed like he wanted to get it much finer but top-edged it to deep-backward square. 139ks short of length at the hips, shot was on but it'll be a first-over wicket for Siraj

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Prasidh Krishna b Rabada 96 (47b 8x4 7x6 104m) SR: 204.25

dismissalComment.html: Oh boy, Sooryavanshi falls short by four runs this time! He was out for 97 in the last game, he goes for 96 today. Silence all around as Sooryavanshi looks to tennis-smash this short ball. Like in the last game, this ends up going up off the toe end and it's a simple catch at deep third, where Prasidh takes the catch. Very similar to how he got out in the last game, and he's distraught. The silence soon makes way for applause as he walks off

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel c Shubman Gill b Rabada 7 (6b 1x4 0x6 5m) SR: 116.66

dismissalComment.html: Pitched up and Rabada strikes! He went full and on middle and off, 146ks and may have seamed away a touch. Jurel stood on leg and went for a lofted off drive. Bat-face opened and it floated high to mid-off.

dismissalText.commentary: Sai Sudharsan hit wicket b Brijesh Sharma 58 (32b 8x4 1x6 67m) SR: 181.25

dismissalComment.html: Oh my, B Sai Sudharsan is hit wicket twice in two innings! This is unbeleivable! Low full toss outside off and he drives it with an open face. The ball goes away fine on the off side for four, but in his follow through, the bat goes flying out of his hands and lands on the stumps. Gill is on his haunches, he can't believe it, and neither can Sai Sudharsan! Even Jurel is sympathetic as he comes over and hands SaiSu his bat back, and gives him a pat on the shoulder
